---
title: "Working With A Project In Studio Modeler"
---

---
title: "Working with a Project in Studio Modeler"
source: "https://support.hyland.com/r/Current/Hyland-Governance/hcu1748322602302"
section: "Hyland Governance"
---

When the Governance project is created, Studio Modeler allows you to access various Governance project details from the All projects and All Governance projects level. You can also modify project's properties from both levels.

To manage the Governance project:
1.  Click on a project name in one of the following lists:
| Level | Description |
| --- | --- |
| All projects | Opens a view where you can validate and release a project. From this view you can create a process and UI for successful project release. This view also allows you to create and download a file plan and create a content type. |
| All Governance projects | Opens a view where you can see details of a file plan, categories, subcategories, and retention policy. These can be added, modified, and deleted from this level. You can add a Governance project to favorites by clicking the star adjacent to the project name. |

When a Governance project is created, it is displayed both on the All Projects and All Governance projects lists in Studio Modeler. Both lists can be used to manage the Governance project.
2.  Click more actions button adjacent to the project name in the All (Governance) projects layout to modify the project's properties . The following options are available:    ![The image showing more actions button](data:image/png;base64,)
| Option | Description |
| --- | --- |
| Edit project name | This option allows you to change the project name. Changing the project name does not change the file plan name. |
| Delete project | This option allows you to delete single or multiple projects. This action cannot be reversed. You can delete multiple projects at once by selecting Enable projects selection button at the right side of the window and selecting the projects you want to delete. |
| Download project | This option allows you to download the project as a .zip file and see its content or edit it locally. |
| Save as new project | This option allows you to create a duplicated project with all of its settings and properties. |
| Collaborators | This option allows you to manage access for individual projects. You can add or delete collaborators. |
| View project releases | This option allows you to view the history of the past releases, if the project was released multiple times. When you click on the vertical ellipsis button adjacent to the project release, you can download the project release, restore a previous release of the project, and edit a previous project release name for easier distinction between multiple releases. |

For more information on the above options, see the Projects section in the Hyland Automate Modeler documentation
